label.text: * Colored cells have variance values not averages.

transforms.name: Markup
transforms.expr: CASE WHEN "ClientType" = '10' THEN "Volume" * TRY_CAST("Type 1 Markup" AS DOUBLE) / 10000 WHEN "ClientType" = '20' THEN "Volume" * TRY_CAST("Type 2 Markup" AS DOUBLE) / 10000 ELSE NULL END

transforms.name: LP Commision
transforms.expr: CASE WHEN "ClientType" = '10' AND "Entry" = 0 THEN "Volume" * TRY_CAST("CostPL_LP Commission Fees" AS DOUBLE) / 10000 ELSE NULLEND

transforms.name: LP Markup
transforms.expr: CASE WHEN "ClientType" = '20' THEN "Volume" * TRY_CAST("CostPL_LP Markup Fees" AS DOUBLE) / 10000 ELSE NULLEND

transforms.name: Gross Markup
transforms.expr: CASE   WHEN "ClientType" IN ('10', '20')     AND "Action" IN (0, 1)     AND "Entry" IN (0, 1)     AND "Dealer" != 0     AND "PriceGateway" IS NOT NULL     AND "PriceGateway" != 0   THEN ("Price" - "PriceGateway")        * CASE WHEN "Action" = 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE -1.0 END        * ("Volume" / 10000.0)        * "ContractSize"        * "RateProfit"   ELSE NULL END

transforms.name: Gross Commissions
transforms.expr: CASE   WHEN "ClientType" IN ('10', '20')     AND "Action" IN (0, 1)     AND "Entry" IN (0, 1)     AND "Dealer" != 0   THEN -"Commission"   ELSE NULL END

transforms.name: LP Commission
transforms.expr: CASE   WHEN "Action" IN (0, 1)     AND "Dealer" != 0   THEN -"Commission"   ELSE NULL END

transforms.name: LP Swap
transforms.expr: CASE   WHEN "Action" IN (0, 1)     AND "Dealer" != 0   THEN -"Storage"   ELSE NULL END

transforms.name: Gross Markup
transforms.expr: CASE   WHEN "ClientType" IN ('10', '20')     AND "Action" IN (0, 1)     AND "Entry" IN (0, 1)     AND "Dealer" != 0     AND "PriceGateway" IS NOT NULL     AND "PriceGateway" != 0   THEN ("Price" - "PriceGateway")        * CASE WHEN "Action" = 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE -1.0 END        * ("Volume" / 10000.0)        * "ContractSize"        * "RateProfit"   ELSE NULL END

transforms.name: Gross Commissions
transforms.expr: CASE   WHEN "ClientType" IN ('10', '20')     AND "Action" IN (0, 1)     AND "Entry" IN (0, 1)     AND "Dealer" != 0   THEN -"Commission"   ELSE NULL END

transforms.name: LP Commission
transforms.expr: CASE   WHEN "Action" IN (0, 1)     AND "Dealer" != 0   THEN -"Commission"   ELSE NULL END

transforms.name: LP Swap
transforms.expr: CASE   WHEN "Action" IN (0, 1)     AND "Dealer" != 0   THEN -"Storage"   ELSE NULL END
